title: OpenAI to Spend $50 Billion on Computing in 2026, Brockman Says

title: Cerebras Requires Limit Orders From IPO Buyers as Demand Grows

title: AI has companies cutting jobs - but not replacing workers
description: Discover the truth behind artificial intelligence and jobs: how corporate shifts can influence workforce stability and structure.
content:
The conventional story about AI and jobs goes like this: A machine learns to do what a human used to do, and the human is let go. That narrative treats displacement as a task-level event. A role is automated, so the role disappears.

title: Child safety lab launching ‘independent crash testing’ for AI tools
description: Since independent vehicle testing began in the mid-1990s, automakers have been incentivized to make safety changes that have saved thousands of lives each year. Now, a new group is hoping to take a similar approach to artificial intelligence.
